channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ogun court sentences 27-year-old man to 12 years imprisonment for trafficking two minors
item.description: A 27-year-old man, Chukwuemeka Iheamama, has been sentenced to 12 years in prison for trafficking two 15-year-old girls for exploitation. The judgment was delivered by the Federal High Court in Abeoku...

item.title: Passengers Support Grieving Man Travelling from Diani to Nairobi After Mother’s Death
item.description: Paul Gathuma shared an emotional experience of how strangers comforted him during a difficult flight from Diani to Nairobi after learning about the death of his mother. According to his account, he bo...

item.title: Photographs Documenting the Extreme Winter of 1962–1963 in the United Kingdom
item.description: The article presents a curated collection of 45 historical photographs illustrating the severe winter known as the Big Freeze of 1962–1963 in the United Kingdom. This period is widely regarded as one ...

item.title: DSWD to distribute cash aid to 50,000 transport workers in Pasay
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) is set to roll out a large-scale cash assistance program targeting around 50,000 riders and drivers in Pasay City. The initiative forms part of ...

item.title: NRC boosts Lagos–Ibadan train services for Sallah travel rush
item.description: The Nigerian Railway Corporation (NRC) has announced a temporary increase in train services on the Lagos–Ibadan Train Service corridor ahead of the Eid-El-Kabir (Sallah) celebration scheduled for May ...

item.title: Study Links Hypothalamic Menin Decline to Aging and Cognitive Impairment in Mice
item.description: Researchers from Xiamen University reported new findings suggesting that a protein called Menin may play an important role in regulating aging processes in mice. The study, published in PLOS Biology, ...

item.title: Nathaniel Parker honours his mother through Samuel Johnson reading for Celebration Day
item.description: Actor Nathaniel Parker has taken part in a commemorative short film for Celebration Day, a nationwide initiative encouraging people to pause and remember loved ones who have shaped their lives. In the...

item.title: Photos Document Priscilla Beaulieu’s Teenage Years in West Germany Before Moving to Elvis Presley’s World
item.description: The article looks back at a series of photographs showing Priscilla Beaulieu, later known as Priscilla Presley, during her teenage years in West Germany between 1960 and 1962. The period followed her ...

item.title: Weekly Horoscope Forecast Highlights Emotional Awareness and Personal Determination
item.description: Astrologer Sally Brompton’s horoscope for May 24, 2026, provides guidance for all zodiac signs, emphasizing emotional balance, personal confidence, and practical decision-making during the coming week...

item.title: Investigation launched after Chinese investor found burned at National Museum
item.description: Authorities in the country are currently investigating a disturbing incident in which the body of a Chinese investor was found burned at the National Museum. According to law enforcement reports, emer...

item.title: African diplomats boycott Pretoria Africa Day event amid xenophobia and safety concerns
item.description: African ambassadors from several countries are expected to boycott South Africa’s main Africa Day commemoration in Pretoria following rising concerns about xenophobic tensions and the safety of foreig...

item.title: Boston Blue Season 1 Finale Ends on Cliffhanger as Producers Address Character Fate and Season 2 Plans
item.description: The first season of CBS’s “Boston Blue” concluded with a dramatic cliffhanger involving a violent car crash that leaves the fate of Det. Brian Rodgers uncertain. In the finale, Lena Silver survives a ...

item.title: Evacuation orders issued in Orange County after overheating chemical tank raises explosion concerns
item.description: Authorities in Orange County, Southern California, ordered the evacuation of around 40,000 residents after a pressurised chemical tank at an industrial facility began overheating and raised fears of a...

item.title: David Pocock considers future political options including potential independent party discussions
item.description: ACT independent senator David Pocock has signalled he is open to significant changes in the future direction of the crossbench community independents movement, including the possibility of forming a p...

item.title: India advises against non-essential travel to Congo, Uganda and South Sudan due to Ebola outbreak
item.description: The Government of India has issued a public health advisory urging citizens to avoid non-essential travel to the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), Uganda, and South Sudan in response to a worsen...

item.title: Orange County chemical leak forces mass evacuations with uncertain return timeline
item.description: Thousands of residents across multiple cities in Orange County, California, were forced to evacuate their homes due to a hazardous chemical leak at an aerospace plastics facility in Garden Grove. Offi...

item.title: Ferdinand Omanyala wins 100m at Xiamen Diamond League with season-best 9.94s
item.description: Kenyan sprint star Ferdinand Omanyala has once again shown strong form on the global athletics stage after winning the men’s 100m race at the Xiamen Diamond League in China. He clocked a season-best t...

item.title: Rivers Old Students Association Calls for Structured Mentorship for Boys’ Development
item.description: As the world marked the 2026 International Day of the Boy Child, the Rivers Secondary Schools Old Boys and Girls 1983 Set Association has called for stronger and more intentional mentoring of boys to ...

item.title: Movie review of ‘The Mandalorian and Grogu’ describes it as a flashy but overindulgent popcorn film
item.description: The article is a movie review written by Ralph Revelar Sarza, published on May 24, 2026, discussing the film ‘The Mandalorian and Grogu,’ a new entry in the Star Wars universe. The review frames the f...

item.title: PM Shehbaz says Pakistan ready to host next round of Iran-US peace talks amid regional mediation efforts
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said Pakistan is hopeful of hosting another round of Iran-US peace talks in the near future as diplomatic efforts continue to reduce tensions in the Middle East. In a sta...
